title: Probability Distributions
description: Explore discrete and continuous probability distributions, including Binomial and Normal distributions.

contentBlocks.text: A **Discrete** variable has countable outcomes (like counting heads in coin flips), while a **Continuous** variable can take any value in a range (like height or time).
The bell-shaped curve represents the Normal Distribution. It is symmetrical about the mean and follows the **68-95-99.7 rule**.
